tagline: Find the perfect pickup game nearby.

designSystem.style: Energetic sports app with warm orange-coral brand color, clean card-based layout, vibrant match score indicators, and micro-interactions throughout. Features a dynamic map preview, sport/skill filters, and a bottom nav with a prominent Post floating action button.

screens: Discover - nearby games map + filtered list with match fit scores
Board - my games, alerts, and saved games tabs
Post Game - sport selector, intensity/vibe picker, slot counter, and location
Profile - stats, preferences, settings with theme toggle, and fit history
